text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam said there is a “glimmer of hope” that Lebanon can overcome its current crisis despite ongoing challenges. The government is working to mobilise domestic and international backing, especially from Arab states, to end the Israeli occupation and restore security and prosperity. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆表示，尽管面临持续挑战，黎巴嫩仍有“一线希望”克服当前的危机。政府正致力于动员国内和国际支持，特别是来自阿拉伯国家的支持，以结束以色列的占领并恢复安全与繁荣。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇴🇲🇷🇺 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi will begin a tour to Islamabad, Muscat and Moscow starting Friday evening for bilateral consultations, discussions on regional developments and the latest situation of the US‑Israeli imposed war against Iran.…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 CNN: An Iranian delegation is expected to hold talks with Pakistani mediators on Friday – but not with US representatives, according to a US source and Iranian state media. Pakistan expects that Friday’s meeting will lead to a second round of direct US‑Iran talks. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇴🇲🇷🇺 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐将于周五晚开始对伊斯兰堡、马斯喀特和莫斯科进行访问，进行双边磋商，讨论地区局势发展以及美国和以色列对伊朗发动的战争的最新情况……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 美国有线电视新闻网（CNN）：据美国消息人士和伊朗官方媒体称，预计伊朗代表团将于周五与巴基斯坦调解人举行会谈，但不会与美国代表会谈。巴基斯坦预计周五的会议将促成第二轮美伊直接会谈。 @wfwitness

text: 📝 Новый обмен 📝 Российская и украинская сторона провели четвертый в этом году обмен пленными. Домой вернутся 193 российских военнослужащих . Содействие в обмене оказывали Арабские Эмираты и США. Украинские же формирования получили назад 193 своих пленных. ➡️ Прошлый обмен прошел несколько недель назад в преддверии Пасхи. Тогда домой вернулись 175 человек, а также семеро похищенных мирных жителей Курской области . Всего с начала года обменяны 1035 человек , из них 10 гражданских . ➡️ Освобожденные россияне на данный момент находятся в Белоруссии. После необходимых медицинских мероприятий они будут доставлены на Родину для реабилитации. #Белоруссия #Россия #Украина ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 新的交换 📝 俄罗斯和乌克兰方面进行了今年第四次战俘交换。193名俄罗斯军人将返回家园。阿拉伯联合酋长国和美国为此次交换提供了协助。乌克兰方面也收回了193名被俘人员。 ➡️ 上一次交换发生在几周前复活节前夕。当时有175人返回家园，还有7名被绑架的库尔斯克州平民。自年初以来，共交换了1035人，其中包括10名平民。 ➡️ 获释的俄罗斯人目前在白俄罗斯。在完成必要的医疗程序后，他们将被送回祖国进行康复治疗。 #白俄罗斯 #俄罗斯 #乌克兰 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: 🇷🇺 🔁 🇺🇦 Russian soldiers liberated from Ukrainian captivity as a result of an exchange. 193 servicemen of the Russian Armed Forces returned home. Kiev received the same number of Ukrainian soldiers. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🔁 🇺🇦 作为交换结果，从乌克兰俘虏中获释的俄罗斯士兵。193名俄罗斯武装部队军人返回家园。基辅收到了相同数量的乌克兰士兵。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 "No one sails from the Strait of Hormuz to anywhere in the world without the permission of the United States Navy. The blockade is tightening by the hour." - Pete Kegsbreath 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “没有美国海军的许可，任何人不得从霍尔木兹海峡航行到世界任何地方。封锁正在每小时收紧。” - 皮特·凯格斯布雷斯（Pete Kegsbreath） 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel Secretary of War Pete Hegseth calls out U.S.' allies: "The time for free riding is over." "America and the free world deserve allies who are capable, who are loyal, and who understand that being an ally is not a one way street." "We barely use the Strait of Hormuz as a country. Our energy doesn't flow through there, and we have plenty of energy." "We are not counting on Europe, but they need the Strait of Hormuz much more than we do, and might want to start doing less talking and having less fancy conferences in Europe and getting a boat." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（OSINT）战争部长皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）呼吁美国盟友：“搭便车的时代结束了。”“美国和自由世界理应拥有有能力、忠诚且明白盟友关系并非单行道的盟友。”“作为一个国家，我们几乎不使用霍尔木兹海峡。我们的能源不经过那里，而且我们拥有充足的能源。”“我们并不指望欧洲，但他们比我们更需要霍尔木兹海峡，也许他们应该少说空话，少在欧洲举办花哨的会议，而是去弄艘船来。” 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🚨 CNN reports that the Trump administration is considering targeting IRGC commander Ahmad Vahidi for elimination, citing his hardline positions as a major obstacle to U.S.–Iran negotiations. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2047671806606160114/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🚨 CNN报道称，特朗普政府正在考虑将伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队指挥官艾哈迈德·瓦希迪（Ahmad Vahidi）列为清除目标，理由是他强硬的立场是美伊谈判的主要障碍。与我们一起查看最新动态： @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2047671806606160114/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @posta_octavian : @GunterFehlinger You're a traitor, Gunther. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @posta_octavian : @GunterFehlinger 你是个叛徒，冈瑟（Gunther）。 推文

text: OSINTdefender Iranian Foreign Minister Seyed Abbas Araghchi is set to arrive in Pakistan today to discuss the ongoing situation in the Middle East with his Pakistani counterparts. However, despite reports that talks would be had with the U.S. technical teams still in-country, other reports indicate that such talks will not take place. Foreign Minister Araghchi is also set to visit Moscow, Russia and Muscat, Oman, two close Iranian allies, during his trip. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 伊朗外交部长赛义德·阿巴斯·阿拉格希（Seyed Abbas Araghchi）定于今天抵达巴基斯坦，与巴基斯坦同行讨论中东持续的局势。然而，尽管有报道称将与仍在境内的美国技术团队进行会谈，但其他报道显示此类会谈不会举行。阿拉格希外长在访问期间还将访问伊朗的两个亲密盟友——俄罗斯莫斯科和阿曼马斯喀特。 推文

text: Faytuks News No Iran-U.S. talks to take place during FM Abbas Araghchi’s visit to Pakistan, a senior Iranian source tells Al Jazeera's Ali Hashem No Iran-U.S. talks to take place during FM Abbas Araghchi’s visit to Pakistan, only bilateral engagement, I was told by a senior Iranian source. The FM will visit Muscat and Moscow too to discuss developments. A source familiar with regional discussions told me that Russia has some ideas to help break the deadlock, Oman close ties with Tehran could be also be useful to get an exit from the current crisis over getting back to talks. - Ali Hashem علي هاشم tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 一位伊朗高级消息人士告诉半岛电视台的阿里·哈希姆（Ali Hashem），阿拉格希外长访问巴基斯坦期间不会举行伊美会谈。我被一位伊朗高级消息人士告知，阿拉格希外长访问巴基斯坦期间不会举行伊美会谈，只会进行双边接触。外长还将访问马斯喀特和莫斯科讨论事态发展。一位熟悉地区讨论的消息人士告诉我，俄罗斯有一些想法可以帮助打破僵局，阿曼与德黑兰的密切关系也可能有助于找到摆脱当前恢复谈判危机的出路。 - 阿里·哈希姆（Ali Hashem） 推文

text: WarMonitor A federal judge has unsealed the indictment against U.S. soldier Gannon Ken Van Dyke, accused of using classified intel tied to the Maduro raid to place bets and pocket more than $400 Thousand. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一名联邦法官解封了针对美国士兵加农·肯·范戴克（Gannon Ken Van Dyke）的起诉书，他被指控利用与马杜罗突袭行动相关的机密情报进行赌博，并中饱私囊超过40万美元。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran’s Fars News Agency has released new images showing what it says 2 vessels seized by the IRGC in the Strait of Hormuz. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047669013312929906/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（OSINT）伊朗法尔斯通讯社发布了新图片，显示了其所称的伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队在霍尔木兹海峡扣押的2艘船只。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047669013312929906/photo/1 推文

text: NATO Snubs Boeing, Picks Saab for AWACS NATO is set to replace its aging E-3 AWACS fleet with Saab–Bombardier GlobalEye aircraft after the earlier Boeing E-7 plan collapsed. The shift follows U.S. withdrawal and European push for industrial autonomy. Around 10–14 aircraft are expected, worth roughly €5–6 billion, with entry into service targeted by early 2030s.
text_zh: 北约冷落波音，选择萨博（Saab）作为预警机供应商。在波音E-7计划失败后，北约准备用萨博-庞巴迪GlobalEye飞机取代其老化的E-3预警机队。此举是在美国退出和欧洲推动工业自主之后做出的。预计将采购约10-14架飞机，价值约50-60亿欧元，目标是在2030年代初投入使用。

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese outlets report Israeli strikes on the southern Lebanon town of Deir Aames after the IDF earlier ordered residents to leave, saying Hezbollah rockets had been launched from the area. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047668698454900753/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（OSINT）黎巴嫩媒体报道称，在以色列国防军早些时候命令居民撤离并称真主党从该地区发射火箭弹后，以色列对黎巴嫩南部代尔阿姆斯（Deir Aames）镇进行了打击。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047668698454900753/video/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @Alihashem : No Iran-U.S. talks to take place during FM Abbas Araghchi’s visit to Pakistan, only bilateral engagement, I was told by a senior Iranian source. The FM will visit Muscat and Moscow too to discuss developments. A source familiar with regional discussions told me that Russia has some ideas to help break the deadlock, Oman close ties with Tehran could be also be useful to get an exit from the current crisis over getting back to talks. tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转发 @Alihashem : 阿拉格希外长访问巴基斯坦期间不会举行伊美会谈，只会进行双边接触，我被一位伊朗高级消息人士告知。外长还将访问马斯喀特和莫斯科讨论事态发展。一位熟悉地区讨论的消息人士告诉我，俄罗斯有一些想法可以帮助打破僵局，阿曼与德黑兰的密切关系也可能有助于找到摆脱当前恢复谈判危机的出路。 推文

text: ELINT News RT @mediazona_en : Our update of Russian losses in the war includes over 5,000 new names. This is not related to the current situation at the front: we continue to process social media posts about missing soldiers and confirm their deaths via official state registries https://en.zona.media/article/2026/04/24/casualties_eng-trl https://twitter.com/mediazona_en/status/2047659482805633030/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @mediazona_en : 我们对战争中俄罗斯损失的更新包括超过5,000个新名字。这与前线的当前局势无关：我们继续处理有关失踪士兵的社交媒体帖子，并通过官方国家登记处确认他们的死亡。 https://en.zona.media/article/2026/04/24/casualties_eng-trl https://twitter.com/mediazona_en/status/2047659482805633030/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Earlier today, the Israel Defense Force announced that one of their drones was shot down by a small surface-to-air missile launched by Lebanese Hezbollah in southern Lebanon. This comes despite yesterday’s announcement of a 3-week ceasefire extension in southern Lebanon. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2047666107767488756/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 今天早些时候，以色列国防军宣布其一架无人机被黎巴嫩真主党在黎巴嫩南部发射的小型地对空导弹击落。尽管昨天宣布了黎巴嫩南部停火延长3周，但仍发生了此事。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2047666107767488756/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Hezbollah dismissed President Trump’s three-week extension of the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire, describing the truce as “meaningless.” https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047665611354911181/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 真主党驳回了特朗普总统将以黎停火延长三周的提议，称该休战协议“毫无意义”。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047665611354911181/photo/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - U.S. FDA accelerates research and development of psychedelic treatments for serious mental illness, after Trump signs executive order — CNBC https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2047664900344816064/photo/1 tweet

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @CENTCOM : For the first time in decades, three aircraft carriers are operating in the Middle East at the same time. Accompanied by their carrier air wings, the USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN 72), USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN 78) and USS George H.W. Bush (CVN 77) include over 200 aircraft and 15,000 Sailors and Marines. tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转发 @CENTCOM : 几十年来，三艘航空母舰首次同时在中东地区行动。在航母舰载机联队的陪同下，亚伯拉罕·林肯号（CVN 72）、杰拉尔德·R·福特号（CVN 78）和乔治·H·W·布什号（CVN 77）航空母舰包括超过200架飞机和15,000名水手及海军陆战队员。 推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 ⚡ Fars released photos of two vessels seized by Iran in the Strait of Hormuz. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: Hezbollah shot down an Israeli UAV over southern Lebanon today. Footage from Tyre suggests a second Hermes-450 reconnaissance/strike drone was also downed, likely using a surface-to-air missile.
text_zh: 真主党今天在黎巴嫩南部击落了一架以色列无人机。来自提尔（Tyre）的录像显示，第二架赫尔墨斯-450（Hermes-450）侦察/打击无人机也被击落，很可能是使用了地对空导弹。

text: UAE President MbZ’s Advisor Anwar Gargash on Iran: You can’t be attacked with 2,800 missiles and drones then talk to me about trust. That will take ages and ages.
text_zh: 阿联酋总统穆罕默德·本·扎耶德（MbZ）的顾问安瓦尔·加尔加什（Anwar Gargash）谈及伊朗：你不能在遭到2,800枚导弹和无人机袭击后，再来跟我谈信任。那需要很长很长的时间。

text: UAE President MbZ’s Advisor Anwar Gargash: It has now become very clear to the region, to the United Arab Emirates and other countries, that Iran is the long-term threat.
text_zh: 阿联酋总统穆罕默德·本·扎耶德（MbZ）的顾问安瓦尔·加尔加什（Anwar Gargash）：现在该地区、阿联酋和其他国家已经非常清楚，伊朗是长期的威胁。

text: Any combatant who is wounded, sick, or otherwise incapacitated is considered hors de combat (outside the fight) Under Common Article 3 and Geneva Convention III, they are immediately afforded protected person status and must be: A- Treated humanely, without adverse distinction B- Protected from violence, murder, torture, and cruel treatment C- Given medical care to the extent practicable D- Not targeted under any circumstances
text_zh: 任何受伤、患病或以其他方式丧失行为能力的战斗人员都被视为“丧失战斗力”（hors de combat）。根据《共同第三条公约》和《日内瓦第三公约》，他们立即享有受保护人员的地位，并且必须：A- 受到人道对待，不得有任何不利的歧视；B- 免受暴力、谋杀、酷刑和残忍待遇；C- 在切实可行的范围内获得医疗护理；D- 在任何情况下不得成为攻击目标。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 Israeli airstrikes targeted the town of Deir Aames, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Additional Israeli airstrikes targeted the town of Deir Aames. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 以色列空袭了黎巴嫩南部的代尔阿姆斯镇。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列对代尔阿姆斯镇进行了额外的空袭。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to Mannie's War Room: "The IDF publishes footage it says shows Hezbollah using ambulances for military purposes." By Hamza Attar A breakdown of the fabricated story below: 1- The ambulance was targeted before finding any weapons in it (watch the first video and the ambulance's floor.) 2- The ambulance is filmed in two different locations with different staged weapons (look at the pictures below) 3- "Combatants" were transferred by ambulance after being injured; they are no longer combatants (hors de combat). 4- The last video showed the "combatant" in a body bag; he was dead!! 5- Israel, in the two cases, suddenly missed the "combatants" to film them and fabricate this story.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Mannie's War Room：“以色列国防军发布了据称显示真主党将救护车用于军事目的的视频。” 作者：Hamza Attar。以下是对该虚假报道的拆解：1- 救护车在被发现任何武器之前就已成为目标（观看第一个视频和救护车的地板）；2- 救护车在两个不同的地点被拍摄，并摆放了不同的武器（查看下方的图片）；3- “战斗人员”在受伤后被救护车转移；他们已不再是战斗人员（丧失战斗力）；4- 最后一个视频显示“战斗人员”在尸袋中；他已经死了！！5- 以色列在两起案件中，突然“放过”了这些“战斗人员”以便拍摄他们并编造这个故事。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 The Israeli military has issued an evacuation warning to residents of the Lebanese village of Deir Aames. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Israeli airstrikes targeted the town of Deir Aames, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列军方已向黎巴嫩代尔阿姆斯村的居民发出撤离警告。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列空袭了黎巴嫩南部的代尔阿姆斯镇。@wfwitness

text: Syrian authorities have arrested Amjad Youssef, a former intelligence officer accused of carrying out the 2013 Tadamon massacre in Damascus, where at least 41 civilians were killed.
text_zh: 叙利亚当局逮捕了前情报官员阿姆贾德·优素福（Amjad Youssef），他被指控在2013年大马士革塔达蒙（Tadamon）大屠杀中杀害了至少41名平民。

text: NEW: Indian drug kingpin Salim Dola, linked to Dawood Ibrahim’s network, was arrested in Istanbul during a joint MİT–police operation. Wanted by INTERPOL, he was found hiding with a fake UAE ID. His capture is a major blow to a multi-state synthetic drug network tied to India’s underworld.
text_zh: 最新消息：与达伍德·易卜拉欣（Dawood Ibrahim）网络有关联的印度毒枭萨利姆·多拉（Salim Dola）在伊斯坦布尔的一次土耳其国家情报局（MİT）与警方的联合行动中被捕。他被国际刑警组织通缉，被发现时持有伪造的阿联酋身份证件。他的落网是对与印度黑社会有关的跨国合成毒品网络的重大打击。

text: 📝 Об истоках нынешней бюрократии 📝 На днях вышло интервью руководителя проекта «Рыбарь» Михаила Звинчука с Анатолием Кузичевым . Самыми яркими отрывками мы поделимся отдельно, а полное видео беседы можно посмотреть тут. В целом говорили много о наболевшем: про СВО, про дальние рубежи и про проблемы внутри страны. Например о том, почему бюрократическая машина работает так, как работает и как к этому относиться. Ответ в первую очередь в том, что российская система принятия решений в её нынешнем виде складывалась не в СССР и не в имперский период, а в девяностые — в момент максимальной слабости государства. Отсюда — привычная инертность среднего звена и бесконечные согласования. Отсюда же — диспропорция между статусом страны и скоростью управленческой реакции на внешние вызовы. Это, естественно не диагноз и не повод для самоуничижения. Но многие вопросы к качеству решений отпадают, если помнить, в каких условиях выстраивались институты, и почему их совершенствование потребует значительного времени и сил. #видео #интервью #Россия ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 关于当前官僚主义的起源 📝 日前，“Rybar”项目负责人米哈伊尔·兹温丘克（Mikhail Zvinchuk）接受了阿纳托利·库齐切夫（Anatoly Kuzichev）的采访。我们将单独分享最精彩的片段，完整的对话视频可以在这里观看。总的来说，他们谈论了很多令人痛心的问题：关于特别军事行动、关于边境地区以及国内的问题。例如，为什么官僚机器以目前的方式运作，以及如何看待这一点。答案首先在于，俄罗斯目前的决策体系并非形成于苏联时期或帝国时期，而是在九十年代——即国家最虚弱的时刻。由此产生了中层管理人员习惯性的惰性以及无休止的协调。这也导致了国家地位与应对外部挑战的管理反应速度之间的不平衡。这当然不是诊断，也不是自我贬低的理由。但如果记住这些机构是在什么条件下建立的，以及为什么完善它们需要大量的时间和精力，那么许多关于决策质量的问题就会迎刃而解。#视频 #采访 #俄罗斯 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: Nuno Felix And you won’t be forgotten France played a very significant role in the IAEA in setting the stage for aggression of the US and Israel against Iran, especially in June of 2025. Italy played a secondary, non-visible role. - Mikhail Ulyanov tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 你也不会被遗忘。法国在国际原子能机构中发挥了非常重要的作用，为美国和以色列对伊朗的侵略铺平了道路，特别是在2025年6月。意大利发挥了次要的、不明显的角色。 - 米哈伊尔·乌里扬诺夫推文

text: WarMonitor RT @ImBreckWorsham : Trump was literally asked at the White House ON CAMERA if he was concerned about allegations that he was using the war to manipulate the stock market for personal gain. He didn't react with shock. Or anger. He didn't respond by saying he would never do such a horrible thing. He laughed, looked directly into the camera and said, "the whole world is a casino." People are dying and he simply doesn't care as long as it lines his pockets. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @ImBreckWorsham：特朗普在白宫面对镜头时被直接问到，是否担心有关他利用战争操纵股市以谋取私利的指控。他没有表现出震惊或愤怒。他没有回应说他永远不会做这种可怕的事情。他笑了笑，直视镜头说：“整个世界就是一个赌场。”人们正在死去，而他根本不在乎，只要能中饱私囊。推文

text: WarMonitor A new Strength in Numbers/Verasight poll finds 55% of Americans support impeaching Trump, while 37% oppose and about 8% are undecided. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047661838322811206/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一项新的Strength in Numbers/Verasight民调显示，55%的美国人支持弹劾特朗普，37%的人反对，约8%的人未决定。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047661838322811206/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @byjepstein : New: USS Spruance fired nine "inert" rounds from its 5-inch MK 45 deck gun “precisely" into the engine room of the Iranian-flagged MV Touska, says Gen. Dan Caine, chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff. The US destroyer fired five warning shots before that. Breaking: Navy destroyer USS Spruance fired several rounds from its 5-inch MK 45 gun at the engine room of an Iranian-flagged ship violating the blockade in the Arabian Sea today, after multiple warnings. Marines then boarded the MV Touska, which is in US custody, CENTCOM says. - Jake Epstein tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @byjepstein：最新消息：参谋长联席会议主席丹·凯恩将军称，斯普鲁恩斯号驱逐舰从其5英寸MK 45甲板炮中向悬挂伊朗国旗的“图斯卡”号货轮的机舱“精确”发射了九枚“惰性”弹药。在此之前，美国驱逐舰发射了五枚警告弹。突发：美国海军斯普鲁恩斯号驱逐舰今天在多次警告后，向一艘在阿拉伯海违反封锁线的伊朗籍船只的机舱发射了几枚5英寸MK 45炮弹。中央司令部称，海军陆战队随后登上了目前处于美国监管下的“图斯卡”号。 - 杰克·爱泼斯坦推文

text: WarMonitor People choosing between gas and groceries don’t have “all the time in the world.” Hegseth: “We have all the time in the world, and we're not anxious for a deal” https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2047659213049012429/video/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 人们在汽油和杂货之间做选择，并没有“全世界的时间”。赫格塞斯：“我们有全世界的时间，我们并不急于达成协议” https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2047659213049012429/video/1 - 反对特朗普的共和党人推文

text: Nuno Felix Burrice absoluta do Governo Português. E uma idiotice sem nome. “É preciso estabelecer diálogo com a Rússia para resolver os conflitos em que a Rússia está envolvida", defende Luís Montenegro https://cnnportugal.iol.pt/trump/putin/e-preciso-estabelecer-dialogo-com-a-russia-para-resolver-os-conflitos-em-que-a-russia-esta-envolvida-defende-luis-montenegro/20260424/69eb4bcbd34e28842c834871?utm_medium=Social&utm_campaign=ed-cnnportugal&utm_source=Twitter#Echobox=1777028618 - CNN Portugal tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 葡萄牙政府的绝对愚蠢。简直是不可名状的白痴行为。“必须与俄罗斯建立对话，以解决俄罗斯参与的冲突，”路易斯·黑山主张 https://cnnportugal.iol.pt/trump/putin/e-preciso-estabelecer-dialogo-com-a-russia-para-resolver-os-conflitos-em-que-a-russia-esta-envolvida/20260424/69eb4bcbd34e28842c834871?utm_medium=Social&utm_campaign=ed-cnnportugal&utm_source=Twitter#Echobox=1777028618 - CNN葡萄牙推文

text: Nuno Felix You break it, you own it Pete…. Hegseth: We are not counting on Europe, but they need the Strait of Hormuz much more than we do and might want to start doing less talking and having less fancy conferences in Europe and get in a boat. This is much more their fight than ours https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2047651132764574035/video/1 - Acyn tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 你打破了它，你就得负责，皮特……赫格塞斯：我们不指望欧洲，但他们比我们更需要霍尔木兹海峡，也许他们应该少说废话，少在欧洲开那些花哨的会议，而是去坐船。这更多是他们的战斗，而不是我们的 https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2047651132764574035/video/1 - Acyn推文

text: Nuno Felix Zholgadr is the guy to watch for. If he is part of the delegation its serious…. Bloomberg: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi is expected to arrive in Islamabad Friday night, officials familiar with the matter said. US logistics, security team already in Islamabad for the negotiation process Second round of talks between US and Iran expected - Annmarie Hordern tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix Zholgadr是值得关注的人。如果他是代表团的一员，那就很严重了……彭博社：熟悉此事的人士称，伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希预计将于周五晚抵达伊斯兰堡。美国后勤和安全团队已在伊斯兰堡进行谈判进程。预计将举行第二轮美伊会谈 - 安玛丽·霍登推文
